title: hymenaea oblongifolia var. palustris
intro: Hymenaea oblongifolia var. palustris, also known as the mangrove pellitory, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the mangrove pellitory can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
